open_risks.description: DMD patterns could be over-interpreted without source checking.
open_risks.mitigation: Keep source references and validation notes with every brief.
open_risks.title: Climate-Risk DMD Modelling Brief

open_risks.description: Financial risk output could be mistaken for investment advice.
open_risks.mitigation: Label analytics as decision support and require review.
open_risks.title: Fintech Options Risk Analytics Brief

open_risks.description: Clinical or patient-safety output could be over-trusted.
open_risks.mitigation: Keep outputs advisory and require expert approval.
open_risks.title: Medical AI Wound Diagnostics Launch Brief

open_risks.description: NLP moderation may contain bias or robustness failures.
open_risks.mitigation: Use adversarial tests and human review for sensitive content.
open_risks.title: NLP Hate-Speech Azure Deployment Brief

open_risks.description: Autonomous workflow could create safety or defence misuse risk.
open_risks.mitigation: Require explicit human approval before operational use.
open_risks.title: Robotics Drone Agent Workflow Brief

open_risks.description: Semantic search may surface plausible but weakly relevant recommendations.
open_risks.mitigation: Evaluate retrieval quality and expose confidence.
open_risks.title: Semantic Recommender Product Brief
